creator: tps@vr-web.de
text:
Wrong download link in sysutils/byobu

Fix: 

The download location given in Makefile is wrong. Use "http://byobu.co/download/byobu_5.73.orig.tar.gz" instead.
How-To-Repeat: change to /usr/ports/sysutils/byobu, then "make clean", "make build".
Build-Step will fail exhausting "File not found"-error.
